name: Rosemary
short_description: Rosemary is a first person psychological horror game. Delve into the eerie depths of an abandoned psychiatric facility to unravel the mysteries behind the longing presence of spirits and demons, years after its closure.
detailed_description:
Putting her soul to rest.

Rosemary is a first person psychological horror game. Delve into the eerie depths of an abandoned psychiatric facility to unravel the mysteries behind the longing presence of spirits and demons, years after its closure. At the heart of the narrative lies Rosemary, a patient admitted in the early 1950s, whose spirit remains tethered to the asylum, haunting all who dare to cross its threshold. It's your job to release her from her torment, and shield protect future visitors from her vengeful rage.

Helpful tips:

  • Locate notes scattered across the building.
  • Find keys to unlock doors.
  • Above all else, don't die..

Setting disclosure.

Based on a real world location (Central State Asylum), it targets real world fears many children from Georgia had whilst growing up: the fear of being sent to the insane asylum for not behaving. Although the outside is almost an exact replica, the inside bears no resemblence. This is not a game for interior blueprints.

Rated M for Mature.
